title: Roller bearing assembly with integrated labyrinth seal
abstract: A roller bearing assembly (200) includes a plurality of cylindrical roller bearings (205) guided on a cage ring (215). An integrated labyrinth seal (210) is mounted on the cage ring (215). The labyrinth seal mounted on the cage ring prevents contaminants from entering the bearings.
claims: Claims WE CLAIM: 1. A roller bearing assembly (200), the roller bearing assembly (200) comprising: a plurality of cylindrical roller bearings (205) guided on a cage ring (215) and characterised by an integrated labyrinth seal (210) mounted on the cage ring (215). 2. The roller bearing assembly as claimed in claim 1, wherein the labyrinth seal (210) is a floating type of seal having two sealing interfaces with the bearing, wherein the seal (210) is anchored with the cage ring (215). 3. The roller bearing assembly as claimed in claim 1, wherein the cylindrical roller bearings are multi-row bearings. 4. The roller bearing assembly as claimed in claim 1, wherein the cylindrical roller bearings guided on the cage ring comprising the integrated labyrinth seal prevents contaminants from entering the bearings.
